message:
feat(alloc): add succinct rank/select bitmap for O(1) free-space queries (bd-xzn0)

Jacobson/Clark two-level index (superblocks + blocks) over raw bitmaps.
count_free: 27,600x faster (0.5ns vs 14µs), rank0 in 8ns, select0 in 179ns.
Build cost 3µs amortized over many queries. Index overhead ~7.9% of bitmap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
